title: sarothamnus catalaunicus var. malacitanus
intro: Sarothamnus catalaunicus var. malacitanus, also known as the Malacitan broom, is a plant species within the Fabaceae family. This shrub-like plant is native to Spain and is valued for its medicinal and therapeutic properties. The plant contains various alkaloids, flavonoids, and terpenoids, which contribute to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Traditional herbal preparations include infusions and decoctions, which are used to treat various health conditions, such as digestive issues and skin problems, and are also believed to have immunomodulatory and antispasmodic effects.
